title: EvalRunner
description: SPEC 11.8 evals/runner.json (AD-020, FR-017). Committed values are gate identity; changing any is an explicit eval-policy commit (OQ-017f pins the initial values). rev 2026-07-12: temperature removed — the harness sends no sampling parameters (the pinned model rejects non-default ones with a 400).

tool_budget.description: caps total tool calls per run (OQ-017c)

seed.description: passed through when the provider supports it (OQ-017c)
